bead.title: agent: ExecuteBeadRuntime struct + RunWithConfig + NewTestConfigForBead
bead.description:
Stage 3 of SD-024. Adds ExecuteBeadRuntime, ExecuteBead RunWithConfig variant, and NewTestConfigForBead test constructor. Does not migrate any caller yet.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go — add ExecuteBeadRuntime, RunWithConfig variant
- cli/internal/config/testconfig.go — add NewTestConfigForBead + TestBeadConfigOpts

Depends on beads 1-3 (foundation), independent of bead 16.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go build ./internal/agent/... passes. cd cli && go test -run TestExecuteBeadRuntimeDelegation ./internal/agent/... passes.
